metadata.coverage: 632 266 742 new files (38 TB) incrementally crawled between 29 August 2019 and 3 November 2019 mainly from .PT domain and web sites crawled during the previous crawl.
metadata.creator: Portuguese Web Archive
metadata.notes: All the items of the AWP30 crawl are identified by the custom field pwacrawlid:AWP30. The AWP30 crawl is complete because it was performed with DeDuplicator.
metadata.subject: Complete crawl of the Portuguese web; Portuguese Web Archive; Portuguese online publications; pwacrawlid:AWP30; 2019
metadata.title: The thirty crawl of the Portuguese web (incremental), performed in 2019 (AWP30).
